---
title: "Quality Trimming with DADA2"
author: "Morrow Zhang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup-RM, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, 
                      fig.align = "center",
                      #make sure to create the folder 
                      fig.path = "../figures/01_QualityTrimming")


```
